metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for url-handle==0.1.0

documentation:
npm i wasm-pack-inline -g


RUSTFLAGS="-Zlocation-detail=none -Zfmt-debug=none"  rustup run nightly wasm-pack build . --target web --out-dir pkg --out-name index --release \
--reference-types --weak-refs \
-Z build-std=std,panic_abort \
-Z build-std-features=panic_immediate_abort
wasm-pack-inline ./pkg --dir wasm-inline --name index
wc -c  pkg/index_bg.wasm

wasm-pack build . --target web --out-dir pkg --out-name index --dev
wasm-pack-inline ./pkg --dir wasm-inline --name index
